section_miscategorizations.text: He checks his blood sugars every morning at home.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Home blood sugar monitoring behavior and results are closer to objective data/ongoing management than to the current illness narrative; however, its presence in HPI does not substantially mislead the reader.

section_miscategorizations.text: He is currently diabetic and takes metformin 500mg twice daily.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Diabetes is an active problem and the metformin regimen is part of the chronic problem list/medication list rather than the acute knee injury HPI; still, including it in HPI as relevant history is common and not seriously misleading.
